movie.title: PSI Mangal Mukhi : Season 1 Hindi WEB-DL 720p HEVC | [Complete]
movie.synopsis: A transgender police officer from Uttar Pradesh long ridiculed by her peers and side lined by her superiors, gets her first high-profile case when a television star dies during a shoot. As she dives into the dark belly of entertainment world in Mumbai, uncovering a unique drug culture, workplace ethics, and buried identities—she must fight not only for justice, but also for her own place in a world that never accepted her
